mergeResolutions: The final main integration conflicted in scripts/goal/verify.mjs because main added the ZC-30 plugin coverage gate while this branch added the ZC-29 audit evidence gate. Resolution kept main's ZC-30 helper and map entry intact, then added the ZC-29 helper and map entry beside them.
inspectedSourceGroups: runtime file watcher implementation and tests
runtime thread lifecycle manager and conduit
rollout truncation, startup prewarm, and rollout reconstruction helpers
skills loader, manager, injection, rendering, remote, metadata, config, and test coverage
TypeScript skills loader, bundled skills registry, change detector, skills command, and skills menu

carriedBehavior: throttled receiver coalescing and shutdown flushing
missing-path fallback through nearest existing directory ancestors
recursive watch fallback and live Node FSWatcher error containment
intentionalReductions: AgenC does not mirror the Rust module split, Tokio channels, notify watcher type, or lock-order test harness as separate files; the Node runtime backend preserves the public service behavior in one implementation file.

carriedBehavior: nested SKILL.md discovery, command-directory compatibility loading, and realpath dedupe
frontmatter parsing for tools, args, paths, model, context, agent, effort, shell, hooks, and user-invocable flags
bundled skill reference-file extraction with path-jail checks
skill rendering, argument substitution, invocation tracking, budgeted listing, dynamic path discovery, and watcher cache invalidation
intentionalReductions: ZC-31 owns full Rust core-skills coverage: metadata TOML interface/dependency/policy files, linked-resource mention selection, mention-count indexes, system-skill install/uninstall, remote list/export, and rendering telemetry.
The donor skills menu and dedicated skills command UI are presentation concerns owned by AgenC commands/TUI surfaces, not by runtime/src/skills.
Remote skill download/listing is not part of the local loader; AgenC remote marketplace/auth flows own remote package distribution.

Remote skill download/listing is not part of the local loader; AgenC remote marketplace/auth flows own remote package distribution. SK-01 owns MCP-derived skill resource loading in runtime/src/skills/mcpSkills.ts.

carriedBehavior: rollout replay into live session state
forked child threads from truncated rollout history
serialized fork/root turns by source session
synthesized recovery events for orphaned rollout turns
startup prewarm and provider handle consumption
intentionalReductions: The donor thread manager also constructs auth, environment, model, MCP, plugin, file-watcher, and thread-store services. AgenC keeps those in their owning runtime subsystems and exposes only the conversation manager boundary here.
Out-of-band elicitation and remote thread-store plumbing are omitted from runtime/src/conversation because AgenC protocol, daemon, app-server, and state modules own those contracts.
